title: Define Wave 36 manager assignment center decision rollup contract
description: Extend the architecture docs so manager assignment center queue items can expose additive decision badges, evidence counts, and recommended next actions while preserving the current list contract and navigation flow.
acceptance_criteria: Queue-list contract documents additive decision rollup fields for provider-assignment items
UI state map covers badge/evidence/recommended-action rendering in assignment center cards
Module ownership clarifies backend-owned rollup computation versus mobile presentation
